decisions.description: MIS-7317 - Check if the form name in the web form name contains app or shopper and update the counter
decisions.name: Add_Counter
decisions.label: Add Counter value

rules.name: Manual_Unsync_SFMC_true_Opt_In
rules.label: Manual Unsync SFMC = true + Opt In

decisions.description: Takes Company name from the Website_Domain__c if the user updated is Qualified
decisions.name: Company_not_provided
decisions.label: Company = [not provided]

decisions.description: MIS-3589 A field on lead and contact which codify the first time a lead is Fit Score A-C and Email Domain contains Company
decisions.name: First_A_C_Company_Timestamp
decisions.label: First A-C Company Timestamp

decisions.description: MIS-6321 - Sync to SFMC logic update MIS-5305 MIS-3271 - exclude all social login from syncing to SFMC Batch process that will run after 15 minutes from creation will handle this
decisions.name: Is_outbound
decisions.label: Sync to SFMC

rules.name: Owner_is_Inactive_Reassign_to_SF_Admin_and_ReRoute
rules.label: Owner is Inactive - Reassign to SF Admin and ReRoute

rules.name: Lead_Source_Changed_to_Value_from_list
rules.label: Lead Source Changed to Value from list

rules.name: True_Most_Recent_UTM_Source_Changed
rules.label: True Most Recent UTM Source Changed

decisions.name: Not_Isnull_Current_Registration_Type
decisions.label: Not Isnull Current Registration Type

rules.name: True_Not_Isnull_Current_Registration_Type
rules.label: True Not Isnull Current Registration Type

rules.name: Most_Recent_Cadence_Cadence_ID_is_changed
rules.label: Most Recent Cadence - Cadence ID is changed

decisions.description: It will be populated from the field 'Form_Complete_URL_c' but only if it's empty. MIS-2044
decisions.name: Rule_FC_Update_First_Form_Complete_URL
decisions.label: *Rule (FC)* - Update First Form Complete URL?

rules.name: Collect_first_value_from_Form_Location_Breadcrumb
rules.label: Collect first value from 'Form Location Breadcrumb'

rules.name: Collect_first_value_from_Form_Location_URL
rules.label: Collect first value from 'Form Location URL'

decisions.description: MIS-4553 (Update Lead flows if this logic is changed - Lead_Created_Before_Save & Contact_Before_Save_Flow_Updates)
decisions.name: Rule_LTPL_Job_Titles_Persona_Logic
decisions.label: *Rule(LTPL)* - Job Titles Persona Logic

decisions.description: MIS-6072 MIS-4977 MIS-4811 - replace all previous logic with new logic MIR Status = "Unqualified" -> Update 'Lead Status' to 'Unqualified' MIS-3094
decisions.name: Rule_MSL_MIR_Status_Logic
decisions.label: *Rule (MSL)* - MIR Status Logic

rules.name: MSL_Lead_Status_to_SDR_Prospecting
rules.label: MSL - Lead Status to SDR Prospecting

rules.name: MSL_Lead_Status_to_Nurture
rules.conditionLogic: 1 AND (2 OR 3 OR 4 OR 5 OR 6 OR 7 OR 8 OR 9 OR 10)

rightValue.stringValue: Not a Good Fit: Use Case / Persona / Industry
Not Ready / Bad Timing / No Interest

rules.label: MSL - Lead Status to Nurture

rules.name: Has_any_relevant_SI_field_changed
rules.label: Has any relevant SI field changed

decisions.description: based on Registration Type, LinkedIn campaign, and Email Address Domain Type
decisions.name: Update_Email_Address_Domain_Type_Details
decisions.label: Update Email Address Domain Type Details

rules.name: Copy_from_Email_Address_domain_type
rules.label: Copy from Email Address domain type

Flow.description: MIS-8389 - Added logic to calc si employee min / max + si enrichment timestamp update MIS-7870 - Update logic for Marketing Persona, Changed Shopper Intelligence to Shopper check MIS-7999 - Added Student Bypass SFMC checkbox MIS-7317 - Add Counter Field for Web Form Submissions on Lead/Contact MIS-6931 - Lugia Linkedin Profile MIS-6835 CancellationSurvey_Date__c MIS-6666 - MIR Status Last Modified By MIS-6321 - Sync to SFMC logic update MIS-6022 - WhatsApp Opt Out Timestamp MIS-6072 - MIR Status Updates MIS-6050 - Change Last Owner Assigned to Date/Time MIS-5968 - Count MIR Owners MIS-5740 - Update Last Owner Assigned date

formulas.name: Calc_Marketing_Persona_By_current_registration_type
formulas.expression: IF( CONTAINS({!$Record.Current_Registration_Type__c}, 'Sales') || CONTAINS({!$Record.Current_Registration_Type__c}, 'sales-solution'), 'Sales', IF( CONTAINS({!$Record.Current_Registration_Type__c}, 'Digital Marketing') || CONTAINS({!$Record.Current_Registration_Type__c}, 'web-solution'), 'Marketing - General', IF( ISNULL({!$Record.Current_Registration_Type__c}), 'No Persona', 'No Persona' )))

formulas.description: Extracts the number after the dash from SI_Employees_Type__c
formulas.name: fr_EmployeesMax

formulas.description: Extracts the number before the dash from SI_Employees_Type__c
formulas.name: fr_EmployeesMin
fr_IsValidFormat
formulas.expression: AND( NOT(ISBLANK({!$Record.SI_Employees_Type__c})), FIND("-", {!$Record.SI_Employees_Type__c}) > 1, FIND("-", {!$Record.SI_Employees_Type__c}) < LEN({!$Record.SI_Employees_Type__c}), VALUE(LEFT({!$Record.SI_Employees_Type__c}, FIND("-", {!$Record.SI_Employees_Type__c}) - 1)) <= VALUE(MID({!$Record.SI_Employees_Type__c}, FIND("-", {!$Record.SI_Employees_Type__c}) + 1, LEN({!$Record.SI_Employees_Type__c}))) )

formulas.name: FR_SyncToSFMC
formulas.expression: AND( {!sourcecontainoutbound} = False, {!$Record.HasOptedOutOfEmail} = False, {!$Record.Manual_Unsync_SFMC__c} = False, OR( {!Low_Fit_Score} = False, AND( NOT(REGEX(BLANKVALUE(LOWER({!$Record.Last_Contact_Us_Form_Subject__c}), ""), ".*(support|no cu).*")), NOT(REGEX(BLANKVALUE(LOWER({!$Record.Base_Product__c}), ""), ".*(enrichment|intelligence suite).*")), ISBLANK(TEXT({!$Record.Strategic_Pod__c})), TEXT({!$Record.SW_Fit_Score__c}) = 'S', TEXT({!$Record.Status}) <> "Replied", TEXT({!$Record.Status}) <> "SDR Prospecting", {!$Record.Contact_Us_Help_Timestamp__c} > {!NOW_Minus_30_Days}, NOT(ISBLANK({!$Record.Contact_Us_Help_Timestamp__c})) ) ) )

formulas.name: LeadSourceValueCheck
formulas.expression: OR( ISPICKVAL({!$Record.LeadSource}, 'Pro'), ISPICKVAL({!$Record.LeadSource}, 'ContactForm'), ISPICKVAL({!$Record.LeadSource}, 'Webinar'), ISPICKVAL({!$Record.LeadSource}, 'Webinar On Demand'), ISPICKVAL({!$Record.LeadSource}, 'White Paper'), ISPICKVAL({!$Record.LeadSource}, 'Partnership - Webinar'), ISPICKVAL({!$Record.LeadSource}, 'Partnership - Virtual Events'), ISPICKVAL({!$Record.LeadSource}, 'Partnership - F2F Events'), ISPICKVAL({!$Record.LeadSource}, 'Partnership - Content'), ISPICKVAL({!$Record.LeadSource}, 'Internal - Webinars'), ISPICKVAL({!$Record.LeadSource}, 'Internal - Virtual Events'), ISPICKVAL({!$Record.LeadSource}, 'Internal - F2F Event') )

formulas.name: MaxByMaxFormula
formulas.expression: IF( AND( {!$Record.Employees_Max__c}>= 1, {!$Record.Employees_Max__c}<= 10 ), 10, IF( AND( {!$Record.Employees_Max__c}>= 11, {!$Record.Employees_Max__c}<= 50 ), 50, IF( AND( {!$Record.Employees_Max__c}>= 51, {!$Record.Employees_Max__c}<= 200 ), 200, IF( AND( {!$Record.Employees_Max__c}>= 201, {!$Record.Employees_Max__c}<= 500 ), 500, IF( AND( {!$Record.Employees_Max__c}>= 501, {!$Record.Employees_Max__c}<= 1000 ), 1000, IF( AND( {!$Record.Employees_Max__c}>= 1001, {!$Record.Employees_Max__c}<= 5000 ), 5000, IF( {!$Record.Employees_Max__c}> 5000, 10000, 0 ) ) ) ) ) ) )

formulas.name: MaxByMinFormula
formulas.expression: IF( AND( {!$Record.Employees_Min__c}>= 1, {!$Record.Employees_Min__c}<= 10 ), 10, IF( AND( {!$Record.Employees_Min__c}>= 11, {!$Record.Employees_Min__c}<= 50 ), 50, IF( AND( {!$Record.Employees_Min__c}>= 51, {!$Record.Employees_Min__c}<= 200 ), 200, IF( AND( {!$Record.Employees_Min__c}>= 201, {!$Record.Employees_Min__c}<= 500 ), 500, IF( AND( {!$Record.Employees_Min__c}>= 501, {!$Record.Employees_Min__c}<= 1000 ), 1000, IF( AND( {!$Record.Employees_Min__c}>= 1001, {!$Record.Employees_Min__c}<= 5000 ), 5000, IF( {!$Record.Employees_Min__c}> 5000, 10000, 0 ) ) ) ) ) ) )

formulas.name: MinByMaxFormula
formulas.expression: IF( AND( {!$Record.Employees_Max__c}>= 1, {!$Record.Employees_Max__c}<= 10 ), 1, IF( AND( {!$Record.Employees_Max__c}>= 11, {!$Record.Employees_Max__c}<= 50 ), 11, IF( AND( {!$Record.Employees_Max__c}>= 51, {!$Record.Employees_Max__c}<= 200 ), 51, IF( AND( {!$Record.Employees_Max__c}>= 201, {!$Record.Employees_Max__c}<= 500 ), 201, IF( AND( {!$Record.Employees_Max__c}>= 501, {!$Record.Employees_Max__c}<= 1000 ), 501, IF( AND( {!$Record.Employees_Max__c}>= 1001, {!$Record.Employees_Max__c}<= 5000 ), 1001, IF( {!$Record.Employees_Max__c}> 5000, 5001, 0 ) ) ) ) ) ) )

formulas.name: MinByMinFormula
formulas.expression: IF( AND( {!$Record.Employees_Min__c}>= 1, {!$Record.Employees_Min__c}<= 10 ), 1, IF( AND( {!$Record.Employees_Min__c}>= 11, {!$Record.Employees_Min__c}<= 50 ), 11, IF( AND( {!$Record.Employees_Min__c}>= 51, {!$Record.Employees_Min__c}<= 200 ), 51, IF( AND( {!$Record.Employees_Min__c}>= 201, {!$Record.Employees_Min__c}<= 500 ), 201, IF( AND( {!$Record.Employees_Min__c}>= 501, {!$Record.Employees_Min__c}<= 1000 ), 501, IF( AND( {!$Record.Employees_Min__c}>= 1001, {!$Record.Employees_Min__c}<= 5000 ), 1001, IF( {!$Record.Employees_Min__c}> 5000, 5001, 0 ) ) ) ) ) ) )

formulas.description: Turns True if one of the following Polygraph fields has changed
formulas.name: Polygraph_Fields_Changed_formula
sourcecontainoutbound
formulas.expression:
IF( CONTAINS(TEXT({!$Record.LeadSource}) , "Outbound") && CONTAINS(TEXT({!$Record.Original_Lead_Source__c}) ,"Outbound") && TEXT({!$Record.CountryCode}) <> 'US', true, IF( (ISBLANK(TEXT({!$Record.LeadSource})) || ISBLANK(TEXT({!$Record.Original_Lead_Source__c})))&& (CONTAINS( text({!$Record.LeadSource}) , "Outbound") || CONTAINS(TEXT({!$Record.Original_Lead_Source__c}) ,"Outbound")) && text({!$Record.CountryCode}) <> 'US', true,false )
)

formulas.name: Website_Domain_Formula
formulas.expression: If( BEGINS({!$Record.Website}, "www."), IF( FIND('/', MID({!$Record.Website}, 5, LEN({!$Record.Website}) - 4)) <> 0, MID({!$Record.Website}, 5, FIND('/', MID({!$Record.Website}, 5, LEN({!$Record.Website}) - 4)) - 1), MID({!$Record.Website}, 5, LEN({!$Record.Website}) - 4) ), If( BEGINS({!$Record.Website}, "http://www."), IF( FIND('/', MID({!$Record.Website}, 12, LEN({!$Record.Website}) - 11)) <> 0, MID({!$Record.Website}, 12, FIND('/', MID({!$Record.Website}, 12, LEN({!$Record.Website}) - 11)) - 1), MID({!$Record.Website}, 12, LEN({!$Record.Website}) - 11) ), If( BEGINS({!$Record.Website}, "https://www."), IF( FIND('/', MID({!$Record.Website}, 13, LEN({!$Record.Website}) - 12)) <> 0, MID({!$Record.Website}, 13, FIND('/', MID({!$Record.Website}, 13, LEN({!$Record.Website}) - 12)) - 1), MID({!$Record.Website}, 13, LEN({!$Record.Website}) - 12) ), If( BEGINS({!$Record.Website}, "http://"), IF( FIND('/', MID({!$Record.Website}, 8, LEN({!$Record.Website}) - 7)) <> 0, MID({!$Record.Website}, 8, FIND('/', MID({!$Record.Website}, 8, LEN({!$Record.Website}) - 7)) - 1), MID({!$Record.Website}, 8, LEN({!$Record.Website}) - 7) ), If( BEGINS({!$Record.Website}, "https://"), IF( FIND('/', MID({!$Record.Website}, 9, LEN({!$Record.Website}) - 8)) <> 0, MID({!$Record.Website}, 9, FIND('/', MID({!$Record.Website}, 9, LEN({!$Record.Website}) - 8)) - 1), MID({!$Record.Website}, 9, LEN({!$Record.Website}) - 8) ), IF( FIND('/', MID({!$Record.Website}, 1, LEN({!$Record.Website}))) <> 0, MID({!$Record.Website}, 1, FIND('/', {!$Record.Website}) - 1), {!$Record.Website} ) ) ) ) ) )

Flow.label: Lead Updated - Before Save

recordUpdates.name: ESQ_Update_Enrichment_Source_to_Qualified
recordUpdates.label: ESQ - Update Enrichment Source to Qualified

recordUpdates.name: FLU_Update_First_Value_From_Form_Location_URL
recordUpdates.label: FLU - Update First Value From 'Form Location URL'

recordUpdates.label: ICD - Update Initial Contact Date Field

recordUpdates.name: MSL_Update_Lead_Status_to_SDR_Prospecting
recordUpdates.label: MSL - Update Lead Status to 'SDR Prospecting'

recordUpdates.name: MSL_Update_Lead_Status_to_Unqualified_AND_Opt_Out_AND_Do_Not_Call
recordUpdates.label: MSL - Update Lead Status to 'Unqualified' AND Opt Out AND Do Not Call

recordUpdates.name: Update_Company_Name_from_Website_Domain
recordUpdates.label: Update Company Name from Website Domain

recordUpdates.name: Update_Intent_Score_Snapshot_and_Timestamp
recordUpdates.label: Update Intent Score Snapshot and Timestamp
